constraints: Review packet must not accept submitted evidence.
Review packet must not grant runtime enablement authority.
Repo-local witness refs must not satisfy requested runtime enablement input names by themselves.
Missing operator approval, runtime disablement rollback plan, and trusted runtime clock evidence must remain explicit.
non_goals: Do not grant runtime enablement authority.
Do not dispatch or invoke a worker.
Do not emit or append runtime receipts.
problem_statement: Runtime enablement submitted refs were recorded for review, but there was no bounded review packet that marked repo-local refs reviewed while preserving missing evidence and authority denial.
success_criteria: The review packet derives from submitted evidence refs.
The packet contains twelve review records, nine reviewed repo-local refs, and three missing input blockers.
Accepted evidence, rejected evidence, authority grants, runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, and terminal closure counts remain zero.
Focused validator, focused pytest, protocol manifest validation, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and whitespace checks pass.
